name: Wikicious
description: India's first fully on-chain DEX on Arbitrum One. 133 audited smart contracts covering perpetual futures (WikiPerp, 48 markets, 50x leverage), spot AMM (WikiAMM), yield aggregation (WikiYield), cross-chain bridging (WikiBridge), liquid staking (WikiStaking), copy trading (WikiCopyTrading), and the world's first on-chain prop trading (WikiPropChallenge). $25M raised.
